channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Austrian Man Jailed 15 Years For Plotting Attack On Taylor Swift Concert

media:content.media:description: The accused admitted planning an Islamist attack on a Taylor Swift concert in Vienna in 2024.

item.description: An Austrian court on Thursday sentenced a 21-year-old who admitted planning a foiled Islamist attack on a Taylor Swift concert in Vienna in 2024 to 15 years in prison.
item.content:encoded: An Austrian court on Thursday sentenced a 21-year-old who admitted planning a foiled Islamist attack on a Taylor Swift concert in Vienna in 2024 to 15 years in prison.

item.title: "Won't Tolerate": US Threatens To Sanction Ally Oman Over Hormuz Tolls

media:content.media:description: Scott Bessent said US would "not tolerate any effort to impose a tolling system in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.description: He said the United States would "not tolerate any effort to impose a tolling system in the Strait of Hormuz," a reference to Iranian proposals to do so as part of a potential agreement with Washington.
item.content:encoded: He said the United States would "not tolerate any effort to impose a tolling system in the Strait of Hormuz," a reference to Iranian proposals to do so as part of a potential agreement with Washington.

item.title: US, Iran Agree On Ceasefire Deal, Trump Yet To Approve It: Report

media:content.media:description: Trump has not signed off on the deal and said he wants to think about it

item.description: US, Iran Agree On Deal Framework, Awaiting Trump Approval: Report
item.content:encoded: US, Iran Agree On Deal Framework, Awaiting Trump Approval: Report

item.title: Trump Mixes Up Iran And Venezuela Two Days After 'Perfect' Health Report

media:content.media:description: Tuesday's appointment marked Trump's third visit to Walter Reed in the past 13 months

item.description: The apparent mix-up came just a day after Trump declared that his annual medical examination had gone "perfectly".
item.content:encoded: The apparent mix-up came just a day after Trump declared that his annual medical examination had gone "perfectly".

item.title: US Investigates Woman Who Accused Trump Of Sexual Assault: Report

media:content.media:description: The Justice Department is scrutinising a statement Carroll made in the course of the civil litigation.

item.description: E Jean Carroll has said a flirtatious, chance encounter with Trump in 1996 at Bergdorf Goodman's Fifth Avenue store in Manhattan ended violently.
item.content:encoded: E Jean Carroll has said a flirtatious, chance encounter with Trump in 1996 at Bergdorf Goodman's Fifth Avenue store in Manhattan ended violently.

item.title: "Terrorist Attack": Man Stabs, Wounds 3 At Swiss Train Station

media:content.media:description: The man, identified as Nesip Dedeler, had been wielding a knife and had injured three men.

item.description: Witnesses described scenes of panic and confusion when the man suddenly began stabbing people at the main train station in Winterthur.
item.content:encoded: Witnesses described scenes of panic and confusion when the man suddenly began stabbing people at the main train station in Winterthur.

item.title: Netanyahu Orders Israel Army To Take Control Of 70% Of Gaza Strip

media:content.media:description: Israel has killed more than 900 people since the ceasefire, according to Gaza's health ministry.

item.description: Gaza remains gripped by daily violence, with both the Israeli military and Hamas accusing one another of violating the truce in effect since October 10.
item.content:encoded: Gaza remains gripped by daily violence, with both the Israeli military and Hamas accusing one another of violating the truce in effect since October 10.

item.title: US Forces In War Zones Being Targeted Using Location Data: Report

media:content.media:description: Location data is widely used in digital advertising.

item.description: The disclosure was the first official confirmation that US forces had been targeted in an active war zone, a letter sent on Thursday to the Pentagon said.
item.content:encoded: The disclosure was the first official confirmation that US forces had been targeted in an active war zone, a letter sent on Thursday to the Pentagon said.

item.title: US, Israel Want To Bring Iran To Knees To Compensate For Defeat: Mojtaba

media:content.media:description: Mojtaba said everyone 'devoted' to Iran should strive to safeguard its "unity"

item.description: Khamenei's address marks the anniversary of the founding of Iran's national legislature. The Supreme Leader has not appeared in public since before he took office in March.
item.content:encoded: Khamenei's address marks the anniversary of the founding of Iran's national legislature. The Supreme Leader has not appeared in public since before he took office in March.

item.title: OpenAI Foundation commits $250 million to help workers, economies navigate AI disruption

media:content.media:description: Grants will go to non-profits as well as a wide range of other organizations

item.description: The rising use of AI tools capable of automating tasks such as coding have sparked fears of widespread job losses, with several companies including Block and Standard Chartered, explicitly citing AI efficiencies for recent layoffs.
item.content:encoded: The rising use of AI tools capable of automating tasks such as coding have sparked fears of widespread job losses, with several companies including Block and Standard Chartered, explicitly citing AI efficiencies for recent layoffs.

item.title: Japan Bans Indian Mangoes After 20 Years. Food Officials Found This

media:content.media:description: The suspension marks the first such restriction in nearly two decades

item.description: Japan follows a zero-tolerance policy for invasive pests like fruit flies, which are considered a major threat to domestic agriculture.
item.content:encoded: Japan follows a zero-tolerance policy for invasive pests like fruit flies, which are considered a major threat to domestic agriculture.

item.title: Google's AI Boss Hints Bots May Surpass Human Intelligence Soon

media:content.media:description: The future sci-fi movies warned us about may have just moved closer

item.description: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis says Superhuman AI is close
item.content:encoded: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis says Superhuman AI is close

item.title: India To Build 14 Schools In Earthquake-Affected Districts Of Nepal

media:content.media:description: Nepal witnessed its worst earthquake in 2015, which killed nearly 9,000 people. (File)

item.description: India has pledged Nepali Rupees 560.2 million for the construction of 14 schools in eight earthquake-affected districts of Nepal, reaffirming its commitment to the Himalayan nation's post-disaster reconstruction and socio-economic development.
item.content:encoded: India has pledged Nepali Rupees 560.2 million for the construction of 14 schools in eight earthquake-affected districts of Nepal, reaffirming its commitment to the Himalayan nation's post-disaster reconstruction and socio-economic development.

item.title: AI Surpassing Humans Debate Heats Up As Google AI Boss Tightens Timeline

media:content.media:description: AI will eventually be better than all humans at everything, says OpenAI's Sam Altman

item.description: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis has again stirred up the AGI or Superhuman AI debate, Google CEO Sundar Pichai has also chimed in.
item.content:encoded: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis has again stirred up the AGI or Superhuman AI debate, Google CEO Sundar Pichai has also chimed in.

item.title: "Never Ever": North Korea Rejects Denuclearisation Push By Quad Nations

media:content.media:description: North Korea's foreign ministry also accused the Quad of interfering in Pyongyang's sovereign affairs

item.description: North Korea on Thursday condemned the joint statement issued by the Quad nations calling for Pyongyang's complete denuclearisation, reiterating that it will never abandon its nuclear weapons program, according to South Korean news agency Yonhap.
item.content:encoded: North Korea on Thursday condemned the joint statement issued by the Quad nations calling for Pyongyang's complete denuclearisation, reiterating that it will never abandon its nuclear weapons program, according to South Korean news agency Yonhap.

item.title: NDTV Ground Report From Israel's Most Active Conflict Zone Near Lebanon Border

media:content.media:description: In Northern Israel, Hezbollah threat still looms large. Ground report from Tefen.

item.description: NDTV reports from Tefen, one of the most sensitive conflict zones along Israel's northern front, where Hezbollah attacks continue to keep both civilians and security forces under pressure.
item.content:encoded: NDTV reports from Tefen, one of the most sensitive conflict zones along Israel's northern front, where Hezbollah attacks continue to keep both civilians and security forces under pressure.

item.title: US Hunger Crisis Worsens Beyond Covid Years: New York Fed

media:content.media:description: The survey was conducted before the Iran war, which has hiked the price of groceries in US (File)

item.description: More Americans are suffering from hunger this year than during the height of the Covid-19 pandemic, the Federal Reserve Bank of New York said Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: More Americans are suffering from hunger this year than during the height of the Covid-19 pandemic, the Federal Reserve Bank of New York said Wednesday.

item.title: Iran War LIVE Updates: US, Iran Trade Strikes After Trump's 'Negotiating On Fumes' Warning

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates

item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Parking Zone To Hospital In 7 Hours: Inside Underground Health Camp In Israel

media:content.media:description: The atmosphere resembles a military bunker merged with a modern hospital.

item.description: The hospital was designed after the 2006 Lebanon war exposed the vulnerability of northern Israel's medical infrastructure.
item.content:encoded: The hospital was designed after the 2006 Lebanon war exposed the vulnerability of northern Israel's medical infrastructure.

item.title: 'You Had A Hand Up': US Cop To Disabled Woman Without Right Hand, Video Viral

media:content.media:description: Charges dropped against disabled woman after police error in wireless device violation case.

item.description: A disabled woman had charges dropped against her after a police officer wrongly cited her for distracted driving.
item.content:encoded: A disabled woman had charges dropped against her after a police officer wrongly cited her for distracted driving.
